summary: POS Pricing Feature - Cost View Secret Code Testing Complete. All features verified working. Backend (12/12 tests passed). Frontend UI testing successful - Secret code configuration in Settings, lock button functionality, cost view toggle, and wrong code handling all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented: secret-code-input, cost-view-toggle, secret-code-verify-input, verify-secret-code-btn
Pricing calculation correctly applies margins only for customer view and shows base cost in cost view
Backend API verify-cost-code returns proper HTTP codes (200 success, 401 wrong code, 400 not configured)
seed_data_creation: Secret code '1234' set for 'default' reseller via API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cost View Secret Code feature fully implemented and tested. Secret code can be configured in Settings > Margins tab. Styling page shows 'Customer Price' by default with margins applied. Lock icon toggles to 'Your Cost' view after entering correct code.

settings_secret_code_section.details: Cost View Secret Code section visible in Margins tab with password input, description, and help text

secret_code_save.details: Secret code saved via API and persisted correctly

default_customer_price_view.details: Styling page shows 'Customer Price' header by default with margins applied (CMT: ₹315 vs Cost: ₹185)

lock_icon_present.details: Lock icon button visible next to pricing header with data-testid='cost-view-toggle'

secret_code_modal.details: Clicking lock opens modal with title 'Enter Secret Code', password input, Cancel and Unlock buttons

correct_code_unlocks_cost_view.details: Entering '1234' unlocks cost view - header changes to 'Your Cost', shows 'Viewing your cost price' indicator, lower prices displayed

wrong_code_shows_error.details: Entering wrong code shows 'Invalid secret code' error toast, modal stays open for retry

cost_view_prices_lower.details: Cost view shows prices without margins: CMT ₹185, Total ₹334 vs Customer: CMT ₹315, Total ₹464

toggle_back_to_customer_view.details: Clicking unlocked lock icon switches back to customer pricing

backend_verify_endpoint.details: POST /reseller-settings/{id}/verify-cost-code works correctly - returns 200 on correct code, 401 on wrong code, 400 if not configured

api_verification.GET /api/reseller-settings/{id}: PASS - Returns settings with cost_view_secret_code field
api_verification.PUT /api/reseller-settings/{id}: PASS - Saves settings including secret code
api_verification.POST /api/reseller-settings/{id}/verify-: PASS - Verifies code and returns appropriate response
